name: Applied Digital Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Applied Digital Courts in Jamestown, ND! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Two Rivers Activity Center- Jamestown Parks and Rec
description: Two Rivers Activity Center- Jamestown Parks and Rec is a place to play pickleball in Jamestown, ND. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
